headline: 2 Semiconductor Stocks with Impressive Fundamentals and 1 Facing Challenges
summary: Semiconductors are the silicon backbone of the digital revolution. Compute-intensive AI workloads are also priming them for the next wave of secular growth, so it’s no wonder the industry has outperformed the market over the past six months, delivering returns of 62.2% compared to 8.6% for the S&P 500.
